---
title: "Part III — Electronics"
---

*From real components through op-amp design, detectors, grounding, and feedback loops. The electronics that supports measurements, not consumer electronics.*

| Module | Topic | Tier highlight |
|--------|-------|---------------|
| M12 | Real components | ESR, parasitic L, tempco |
| M13 | Op-amps and analog design | Transimpedance amplifier |
| M14 | Semiconductors and the band gap | Dark current activation energy |
| M15 | Grounding, shielding, and EMI | Ground-loop forensics |
| M16 | Feedback and control | PID, Pound–Drever–Hall |
| M17 | Detectors | SNSPDs, NEP, D* |

**Key references for Part III:** @horowitzHill2015, @ott2011noise, @morrison2016grounding.
